summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing for Decoded MVP landing page. All 8 backend pytest tests pass (subscribe valid/invalid/idempotent/normalization, count). All required data-testid elements render, scroll-to-signup works for both Nav and Hero CTA, email signup submits successfully showing sonner success toast, invalid email shows error toast, and the layout is responsive at 390/768/1920px with zero horizontal overflow.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend Subscriber model uses uuid string id (good, JSON-safe) and excludes _id (good). No issues.
POST /api/subscribe is correctly idempotent — duplicate emails return the existing record with the same id (verified by test).
Email is normalized to lowercase before persistence — verified.
Frontend Footer.jsx error handling correctly parses Pydantic 422 detail arrays into a readable toast.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes per spec.
Minor suggestion (non-blocking): consider adding a unique index on subscribers.email in MongoDB to enforce uniqueness at the DB level (currently enforced only via app-level find_one check).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this MVP
seed_data_creation: Test subscribers created with prefixes ui_test_, test_, idemp_, count_, MIXED_ during test runs (kept; not cleaned up since they are harmless landing-page emails and used by count assertion).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_decoded_api.py and covers all /api/subscribe + /api/subscribers/count behaviours. Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_decoded_api.py -v. Public URL is REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. No auth required. Sonner toasts attach as [data-sonner-toast][data-type=success|error] — use that selector for toast assertions in future Playwright runs.
